creator: grog@FreeBSD.org
text:
As the summary says, devel/web2c fails to build on a 15-CURRENT amd64 machine.  The error messages are (after repeating the 'make' command):

===>  Building for tex-web2c-20230313
--- all ---
/usr/bin/make  all-recursive
--- all-recursive ---
Making all in doc
Making all in lib
Making all in man
Making all in web2c
--- w2c/config.h ---
sh: Syntax error: ";" unexpected
*** [w2c/config.h] Error code 2
